description: Applies a design studio critique approach to produce a learning environment of collaborative and interdisciplinary peer critique and learning, in addition to provide expert feedback and suggestions. Present and defend the latest iteration of the user experience design project developed in earlier courses while learning about the professions associated with digital user experience design.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: COMP SCI/​L I S  613and declared in Design + Innovation MS, or the Capstone Certificate in User Experience Design
